title: Plugin routes ship rendered per-runtime skill trees
action: Per slice-3 rev3 LOCKED topology decision: plugin routes ship COMMITTED rendered per-runtime trees inside each plugin dir — .claude-plugin/skills/ = render(canonical, claude), .codex-plugin/skills/ = render(canonical, codex) — generated ONLY through the cnr2-9 renderer. Repoint each plugin manifest at its committed tree (discover the current reference first: .codex-plugin/plugin.json skills field; the Claude plugin's current skill source — manifest field or implicit root — and change it explicitly). Package-time rendering was REJECTED (decision logged) — do not implement it. Release inventory (scripts/release_manifest.mjs) keeps hashing canonical source for package integrity AND covers the committed rendered trees. Extend test_plugin_distribution.mjs with: (a) drift pin — each committed plugin tree byte-equals render(canonical, that runtime) recomputed at test time; (b) runtime-clean assertions (claude tree free of codex-mechanic phrases, codex tree free of claude-mechanic phrases) — trivially green while zero markers exist, load-bearing after tagging. With zero markers today the committed trees are byte-identical to source — no visible change, machinery + proof only.

truths: each plugin route serves its runtime's rendered tree, generated through the cnr2-9 renderer, never hand-copied
release/package integrity still hashes canonical bytes; rendered plugin trees carry provenance
runtime-clean assertions exist in test_plugin_distribution and are green
with zero markers, shipped plugin trees are byte-identical to today (no regression)
key_links: plugin manifests reference the rendered trees; release inventory covers them
prohibitions: No weakening of the distribution transaction guarantees

verify: bash -c 'env -u BEE_AGENT_NAME bash -c "node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_plugin_distribution.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --selftest && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/test_release_tuple.mjs" && echo PLUGIN-RENDER-OK'

trace.outcome: Committed per-runtime plugin skill-route trees: .claude-plugin/skills/ = render(canonical,claude), .codex-plugin/skills/ = render(canonical,codex), generated only via scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs (reuses cnr2-9's renderSkillBytes/validateSkillMarkers). Both plugin manifests repointed at their own tree; release manifest + plugin_distribution PACKAGE_ROLES extended to cover the rendered trees (canonical skills/ hashing unchanged); test_plugin_distribution gained drift-pin + runtime-clean + inventory-coverage + manifest-routing tests. Deviation: scripts/test_installers_e2e.mjs's own hardcoded package-role Set (independent of PACKAGE_ROLES) was missing the two new roles, causing its synthetic installed-package fixture to omit the rendered trees and fail proveInstalledPackage; auto-fixed to match.
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "red_failure_evidence": "BEFORE this cell: both plugin manifests routed to the canonical skills/ tree directly (.codex-plugin/plugin.json had \"skills\": \"./skills/\"; .claude-plugin/plugin.json had no skills field, implicit default same location, per docs/02-architecture.md's now-corrected claim) — raw canonical source, never passed through the D9 renderer, so a future runtime-tagged skill file would ship the WRONG runtime's off-target block to both plugins alike (the raw-source-bleed blocker named in decision e6fd81fd/83c28915). AFTER: each plugin manifest points at a COMMITTED, generated-only-through-the-renderer tree (.claude-plugin/skills/ = render(canonical,claude), .codex-plugin/skills/ = render(canonical,codex)); the drift-pin test recomputes render(canonical, runtime) from the REAL skills/ tree at test time and asserts byte equality against the committed tree, and the runtime-clean test asserts zero unstripped bee:only/bee:end marker lines survive in either committed tree. Both are trivially green today (zero markers anywhere in skills/, confirmed by an empty `diff -rq skills .claude-plugin/skills` / `.codex-plugin/skills` aside from the new provenance sidecar) and become load-bearing the moment cnr2-10/11 tag real content — a forgotten regeneration or a renderer bug would now fail the mandatory verify chain instead of silently shipping bleed.",
  "tests_inspected": [
    "skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_plugin_distribution.mjs — full existing suite (fixture-based distribution/cleanup transaction tests) re-run unaffected; PACKAGE_ROLES addition is additive only",

    "scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check/--selftest — unaffected structurally; --write now emits 354 records (was 146) purely from the two new enumerateTree() calls"
  ],
  "tests_added_or_changed": [
    "ADDED (test_plugin_distribution.mjs): 'plugin skill tree (claude|codex): every file byte-equals render(canonical, <runtime>)' — recomputes render() from real skills/ at test time, drift-pin",
    "ADDED: 'plugin skill tree (claude|codex): carries the D9 render provenance sidecar' — asserts .bee-render.json schema/target_runtime",
    "ADDED: 'runtime-clean: claude|codex plugin tree carries no unstripped marker line' — exact full-line marker match (not substring), avoiding false positives on onboard_bee.mjs's own comments that document the marker syntax as prose",
    "ADDED: 'release inventory covers both committed plugin skill trees with matching sha256' — loadPackageInventory() against the real regenerated release-manifest.json",
    "ADDED: 'plugin manifests route to their own committed rendered skill tree' — parses the real .claude-plugin/plugin.json and .codex-plugin/plugin.json",
    "CHANGED scripts/test_installers_e2e.mjs — stagedSource()'s hardcoded roles Set gained plugin_skill_claude_render/plugin_skill_codex_render to match plugin_distribution.mjs's PACKAGE_ROLES (deviation, see below)"

  "verification_run": "Per-cell verify chain green (PLUGIN-RENDER-OK): test_plugin_distribution 36/36, release_manifest --selftest PASS, release_manifest --check 354/354 match, test_release_tuple green. Full repo commands.verify chain (24 suites) re-run end-to-end green after `git add -A` staged the new untracked .claude-plugin/skills/, .codex-plugin/skills/, and scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs (test_installers_e2e's staging helper reads `git ls-files`, so new files must be tracked/staged for that suite to see them — expected, not a bug): test_lib 343/0, test_skill_render 27/0, test_onboard_bee clean, test_plugin_distribution 36/0, test_hook_contracts 168/0, test_installers_e2e (bash) 16/0, PIPE_EXIT=0 overall."
